description: Hebrew-substrate anchor lens. Pivots English 'word' onto דָּבָר's logos.utterance.word atom via the he cognition pack's field hook. Renders surface as English compound 'divine-word'. Dual-correction pair with grc_logos_v1: same domain atom (logos.utterance.word), different substrate and cognitive mode — Hebrew dabar is the enacted, event-making divine word (spoken reality), Greek logos is the rational structuring principle. Atom confirmed in he_core_cognition_v1 lexicon (he-core-cog-001). See ADR-0073c.
